hotels.name: Alberti - Bed & Bike
hotels.description_fr:
LГўвӮ¬в„ўГғВ©tablissement Alberti - Bed & Bike vous accueille ГғВ  Rotterdam, ГғВ  800 mГғВЁtres de ce lieu dГўвӮ¬в„ўintГғВ©rГғВӘt : Zoo de Rotterdam. Il possГғВЁde un service de prГғВӘt de vГғВ©los, des hГғВ©bergements non-fumeurs, ainsi qu'une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite dans lГўвӮ¬в„ўensemble de ses locaux. Il est installГғВ© ГғВ  respectivement 5,5 km, 6,5 km et 6,7 km de : Parc dГўвӮ¬в„ўattractions Plaswijckpark, UniversitГғВ© ГғвҖ°rasme et Ahoy Rotterdam. Cette maison d'hГғВҙtes comprend des chambres familiales.

Tous les hГғВ©bergements disposent dГўвӮ¬в„ўune tГғВ©lГғВ©vision ГғВ  ГғВ©cran plat avec les chaГғВ®nes du cГғВўble, dГўвӮ¬в„ўune armoire, dГўвӮ¬в„ўun rГғВ©frigГғВ©rateur, dГўвӮ¬в„ўune machine ГғВ  cafГғВ©, dГўвӮ¬в„ўune douche et d'articles de toilette gratuits. Certains hГғВ©bergements offrent une vue sur le jardin. Tous comportent une bouilloire.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Alberti - Bed & Bike in Rotterdam offers family rooms with private bathrooms, garden views, and free WiFi. Each room includes a tea and coffee maker, hairdryer, and free toiletries.
Convenient Facilities: Guests enjoy free use of bicycles, a coffee shop, and private check-in and check-out services. Additional amenities include luggage storage, a dining area, and a seating area.
Prime Location: Located less than 1 km from Diergaarde Blijdorp and 7 km from Rotterdam The Hague Airport, the guest house is near attractions such as Plaswijckpark and Erasmus University. Boating is available in the surroundings.
Highly Rated by Guests: Alberti - Bed & Bike receives high ratings for its excellent service and comfortable accommodations.
hotels.description_es:
Alberti - Bed & Bike estГғВЎ en RГғВіterdam, a 9 min a pie de Diergaarde Blijdorp, y tiene bicicletas gratis, habitaciones libres de humo y wifi gratis en todo el alojamiento. El alojamiento estГғВЎ a unos 5,5 km de Plaswijckpark, a 6,5 km de Universidad Erasmus y a 6,7 km de Ahoy Rotterdam. El hostal o pensiГғВіn dispone de habitaciones familiares.

Todas las habitaciones estГғВЎn equipadas con TV de pantalla plana con canales por cable, nevera, cafetera, ducha, artГғВӯculos de aseo gratuitos y armario. El hostal o pensiГғВіn dispone de algunas habitaciones con vistas al jardГғВӯn, y todas tienen hervidor. Todas las unidades tienen baГғВұo privado, secador de pelo y ropa de cama.

BCN Rotterdam estГғВЎ a 10 km del alojamiento, y Universidad TГғВ©cnica de Delft estГғВЎ a 12 km.
hotels.description_pt:
Em RoterdГғВЈo, a cerca de menos de 1 km de Jardim ZoolГғВіgico Diergaarde Blijdorp, Alberti - Bed & Bike tem bicicletas gratuitas, quartos nГғВЈo fumador e acesso Wi-Fi gratuito em toda a propriedade. O alojamento estГғВЎ a cerca de 5,5 km de Parque TemГғВЎtico Plaswijckpark, a 6,5 km de Universidade de Erasmus e a 6,7 km de Ahoy Rotterdam. O alojamento apresenta quartos familiares.

Todos os quartos dispГғВөem de uma televisГғВЈo de ecrГғВЈ plano com canais por cabo, frigorГғВӯfico, mГғВЎquina de cafГғВ©, chuveiro, produtos de higiene pessoal gratuitos e roupeiro. O alojamento apresenta alguns quartos com vistas do jardim, e cada quarto estГғВЎ equipado com chaleira. Os quartos tГғВӘm uma casa de banho privativa, um secador de cabelo e roupa de cama.
hotels.description_it:
Ubicato a Rotterdam, a 800 metri da Zoo Diergaarde Blijdorp, Alberti - Bed & Bike offre biciclette gratuite, camere non fumatori e il WiFi gratuito in tutta la struttura. La struttura si trova a circa 5,5 km da Plaswijckpark, 6,5 km da UniversitГғВ  Erasmus e 6,7 km da Centro Congressi Ahoy Rotterdam. Questo affittacamere presenta camere familiari.

Tutte le camere prevedono una TV a schermo piatto con canali via cavo, un frigorifero, una macchina da caffГғВЁ, una doccia, i prodotti da bagno gratuiti e un armadio. Questo affittacamere propone alcune camere con vista sul giardino e, inoltre, tutte le camere sono provviste di un bollitore elettrico. Le camere hanno il bagno privato, l'asciugacapelli e le lenzuola.

hotels.name: Westersingel 24-2
hotels.description_fr:
SituГғВ© dans un quartier central de Rotterdam, lГўвӮ¬в„ўhГғВ©bergement Westersingel 24-2 comprend un balcon offrant une vue sur la ville. Une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite est disponible et un parking privГғВ© peut ГғВӘtre utilisГғВ© moyennant des frais supplГғВ©mentaires.

Cet appartement compte 1 chambre, une cuisine avec un rГғВ©frigГғВ©rateur et un lave-vaisselle, une tГғВ©lГғВ©vision ГғВ  ГғВ©cran plat, un coin salon, ainsi que 1 salle de bains comportant une douche. Cet hГғВ©bergement met ГғВ  votre disposition des serviettes et du linge de lit.

Vous sГғВ©journerez ГғВ  respectivement 1,9 km et 5,1 km de ces lieux dГўвӮ¬в„ўintГғВ©rГғВӘt : Zoo de Rotterdam et UniversitГғВ© ГғвҖ°rasme. L'aГғВ©roport le plus proche (AГғВ©roport de Rotterdam La Haye) est ГғВ  8 km.

Les distances indiquГғВ©es dans la description de l'ГғВ©tablissement sont calculГғВ©es avec ГӮВ© OpenStreetMap.

Modern Amenities: Guests enjoy free WiFi, a balcony with garden views, and a fully equipped kitchen. Additional amenities include a washing machine, bathrobes, and a work desk.
Convenient Location: Located 1.9 km from Diergaarde Blijdorp and 8 km from Rotterdam The Hague Airport. Nearby attractions include Erasmus University and Rotterdam Ahoy, each 5 km away.

hotels.name: Westersingel

hotels.name: B&B Chez Nous

Cette maison d'hГғВҙtes est ГғВ  respectivement 48 km et 49 km environ de : Palais Het Loo et Apenheul. Cet ГғВ©tablissement non-fumeurs se trouve ГғВ  43 km de : Parc national Veluwezoom.

Tous les hГғВ©bergements proposent une armoire, une tГғВ©lГғВ©vision ГғВ  ГғВ©cran plat, une salle de bains privative, du linge de lit et des serviettes. Vous profiterez aussi dГўвӮ¬в„ўun rГғВ©frigГғВ©rateur.

Comfortable Accommodation: B&B Chez Nous in Geesteren offers a recently renovated guest house with a garden and free WiFi. Free on-site private parking is available for guests.
Modern Amenities: Each room includes a private bathroom with a walk-in shower, tea and coffee maker, and free toiletries. Additional features include a dining area, TV, and wardrobe.
Breakfast and Parking: A continental breakfast with vegetarian options is served daily. The ground-floor unit provides easy access and a view of a landmark.
Local Attractions: Nearby attractions include Foundation Theater and Conference Hanzehof (25 km), Sport- En Recreatiecentrum De Scheg (29 km), Nationaal Park Veluwezoom (43 km), Paleis 't Loo (48 km), and Apenheul (49 km).

Este alojamiento libre de humo estГғВЎ a 43 km de Parque nacional de Veluwezoom.

En el hostal o pensiГғВіn, todas las habitaciones disponen de armario, TV de pantalla plana, baГғВұo privado, ropa de cama y toallas. Todas las unidades cuentan con nevera.

hotels.name: Typisch

Modern Amenities: Guests can enjoy a fully equipped kitchen, fireplace, and a work desk. Additional amenities include a TV, parquet floors, and a wardrobe.
Outdoor Spaces: The terrace provides relaxing garden views, while the sauna offers a perfect retreat. Free on-site private parking is available.
Local Attractions: Nearby attractions include Foundation Theater and Conference Hanzehof (28 km), Nationaal Park Veluwezoom (36 km), Arnhem Station and Gelredome (48 km), and Burgers' Zoo (48 km). Winter sports are available in the surrounding area.

LГўвӮ¬в„ўГғВ©tablissement Hof van Halle se trouve ГғВ  Halle, ГғВ  respectivement 29 km et 34 km de ces lieux dГўвӮ¬в„ўintГғВ©rГғВӘt : ThГғВ©ГғВўtre et centre des congrГғВЁs Hanzehof et Parc national Veluwezoom. Il propose une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite, la climatisation, un jardin et une terrasse.

Les hГғВ©bergements disposent dГўвӮ¬в„ўune cuisine entiГғВЁrement ГғВ©quipГғВ©e avec un rГғВ©frigГғВ©rateur, une plaque de cuisson, une machine ГғВ  cafГғВ© et une bouilloire. Vous trouverez une salle de bains privative avec une douche dans tous les logements, tout comme des articles de toilette gratuits et un sГғВЁche-cheveux.

Vous sГғВ©journerez ГғВ  respectivement 44 km et 44 km de ces lieux dГўвӮ¬в„ўintГғВ©rГғВӘt : Gare centrale d'Arnhem et Gelredome.

Les couples apprГғВ©cient particuliГғВЁrement l'emplacement de cet ГғВ©tablissement. Ils lui donnent la note de 9,7 pour un sГғВ©jour ГғВ  deux.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodation: Hof van Halle in Halle offers a bed and breakfast experience with a garden and terrace. Free WiFi is available throughout the property.
Modern Amenities: Each room includes air-conditioning, a private bathroom, and a fully equipped kitchen. Additional features include a dining area, sofa, and free toiletries.
Guest Services: Guests enjoy a free on-site private parking, outdoor seating area, and a breakfast provided by the property. The host ensures a pleasant stay with excellent service.
Local Attractions: Nearby attractions include Foundation Theater and Conference Hanzehof (29 km), Nationaal Park Veluwezoom (33 km), and Arnhem Station (44 km). Winter sports are available in the surrounding area.
hotels.description_es:
Hof van Halle se encuentra en Halle, a 29 km de Teatro y Centro de Convenciones Hanzehoh y a 34 km de Parque nacional de Veluwezoom, y ofrece alojamiento con wifi gratis, aire acondicionado, jardГғВӯn y terraza.

Las unidades incluyen una cocina totalmente equipada con nevera, fogones, cafetera y hervidor. Hay un baГғВұo privado con ducha en todas las unidades, ademГғВЎs de artГғВӯculos de aseo gratuitos y secador de pelo.

EstaciГғВіn de Arnhem estГғВЎ a 44 km del alojamiento, y Gelredome estГғВЎ a 44 km.

A las parejas les encanta la ubicaciГғВіn ГўвӮ¬вҖқ Le han puesto un 9,7 para viajes de dos personas.

Las distancias en la descripciГғВіn del alojamiento se calculan con OpenStreetMapГӮВ©

hotels.description_it:
A Halle, a 29 km da Teatro e Centro Congressi Hanzehof e 34 km da Parco Nazionale Veluwezoom, Hof van Halle prevede alloggi con aria condizionata e accesso a un giardino. Il WiFi gratuito ГғВЁ a disposizione in tutta la struttura e cГўвӮ¬в„ўГғВЁ un parcheggio privato disponibile sul posto.

Tutti gli alloggi includono una terrazza con vista sul giardino, una cucina con frigorifero e piano cottura e un bagno privato con doccia. C'ГғВЁ una zona salotto e una zona pranzo in tutte le unitГғВ .

Stazione di Arnhem ГғВЁ a 44 km da questo bed and breakfast, mentre Stadio Gelredome si trova a 44 km di distanza.

Le coppie apprezzano molto la posizione: l'hanno valutata 9,7 per un viaggio a due.

Le distanze nella descrizione della struttura sono calcolate con ГӮВ© OpenStreetMap
